arts.ttl: Ipswich STUN Spurs for first win of season
arts.sum: Ipswich Town claimed a shock 2-1 victory at Tottenham Hotspur to end their wait for a first Premier League win of the season. Szmodics played a part in Ipswich’s second as his cross was parried by Vicario and the ball rebounded off Radu Dragusin, and Delap was on hand to prod in his sixth league goal of the season.
Ange was asked if the squad was struggling to deal with the Thursday-Sunday side of playing in Europe... Ange: "Look, I think it's the way the Premier League is going.

arts.ttl: How Sheeran played part in Ipswich's 'massive day'
arts.sum: Ed Sheeran plays his part as the Ipswich fan, sponsor and minority shareholder watches his local team's first Premier League win in 22 years.

arts.ttl: 'It's down to me' - Ange Postecoglou admits blame over Tottenham's disappointing loss to Ipswich
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur boss Ange Postecoglou believes he is at fault for his side's disappointing 2-1 loss to newly-promoted Ipswich Town.

arts.ttl: 'That can't carry on': Jamie O'Hara tears into Tottenham and says why fans will 'turn' on Postecoglou soon
arts.sum: Jamie O’Hara is never shy of an opinion or two when it comes to Tottenham and he’s ripped into them after they lost to Ipswich...

arts.ttl: Ipswich 2-1 Tottenham (10 de Nov., 2024) Resultado Final
arts.sum: In addition to the above toggle, you may choose to provide the information requested in this opt-out form, which may enable us to take action on your opt-out election more broadly than just on this digital property. Please note that, because these activities are based on online cookies, your opt-out choice is specific to this property.

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou has awkward confrontation with Tottenham fans as players booed off pitch
arts.sum: Tottenham boss Ange Postecoglou wasn't the most popular man in north London after his side’s dismal 2-1 home loss to Ipswich Town

arts.ttl: Every word Ange Postecoglou said on why Tottenham's inconsistency is his fault and Solanke injury
arts.sum: Ange Postecoglou has been speaking to the media following Tottenham's disappointing 2-1 defeat at home to Ipswich Town on Sunday in the Premier League. The Tractor Boys secured their first league win of the season with Kieran McKenna leading his team back to the club where he started his playing and coaching career.

arts.ttl: Tottenham inconsistency down to me - Postecoglou
arts.sum: Tottenham boss Ange Postecoglou says their inconsistent start is down to him rather than his players after a fifth Premier League defeat.

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou vents fury at Ipswich for time-wasting in Spurs' shock 2-1 defeat... and claims it's now 'part of the Premier League' as he insists his side 'don't do it'
arts.sum: Postecoglou expressed his fury at Ipswich for time-wasting and insisted that Tottenham would never do it. 'I think it's the way the Premier League is going,' he said. 'It's pretty strategic now.'
